channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Monsoon advances to Delhi as heavy rainfall disrupts Mumbai and other regions across India
item.description: The Southwest monsoon has officially arrived in Delhi on July 2, 2026, marking its onset five days later than the normal date of June 27, according to the India Meteorological Department (IMD). This a...

item.title: ActionSA urges investigation into alleged lobbying and influence claims involving Resolve Communications in the GNU
item.description: An open letter from ActionSA national chairperson Michael Beaumont to former Democratic Alliance leader Tony Leon has sparked renewed political tension within South Africa’s Government of National Uni...

item.title: Les Rencontres d’Arles 2026 Preview: Photography Reflects on Two Centuries of Image-Making
item.description: The Les Rencontres d’Arles 2026 photography festival transforms the southern French city of Arles into a wide-ranging exploration of the power, limits, and evolving identity of the photographic image....

item.title: EWURA Announces Slight Reduction in Fuel Prices Across Tanzania for July 2026
item.description: Motorists and households in Tanzania are receiving a small relief at the pump after the Energy and Water Utilities Regulatory Authority (EWURA) announced a reduction in retail fuel prices effective Ju...

item.title: Pakistan introduces cashless payment system at all passport offices nationwide
item.description: The Government of Pakistan has launched a cashless transaction system at all passport offices across the country, aiming to improve efficiency, transparency, and public convenience. Interior Minister ...

item.title: Court postpones sentencing agreement for Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala amid fraud and corruption case
item.description: Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala, a South African businessman facing serious charges linked to a major police tender scandal, will have to wait longer to learn his final prison sentence. His case was postponed ...

item.title: Severe Ottawa storms force cancellation of Prime Minister Carney’s Canada Day speech in Edmonton
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s Canada Day itinerary was significantly disrupted after severe thunderstorms in Ottawa prevented him from travelling to Edmonton for a scheduled national unity speech. Carn...

item.title: Etiquette guidance on attending weddings without gifts and handling perceived social slights
item.description: In this advice column, a mother writes to Miss Manners about concerns arising after her daughter’s recent wedding. The marriage was a second one for both the bride and groom, and the celebration inclu...

item.title: Patrick Riang’a resigns from Car Soko after years of service, pays tribute to colleagues
item.description: Patrick Riang’a, a former sports commentator and radio presenter, has officially announced his departure from Car Soko Ltd, where he served as Operations Manager. In a social media statement shared on...

item.title: US and Iran make diplomatic progress in Doha mediated discussions on ceasefire and MoU implementation
item.description: According to reports from Doha, mediators including officials from Qatar and Pakistan have stated that “positive progress” has been achieved in recent indirect discussions between the United States an...

item.title: Supreme Court affirms women’s inheritance rights under Sharia and invalidates fraudulent property mutation
item.description: The Supreme Court of Pakistan has resolved a decades-old inheritance dispute by reaffirming that women’s inheritance rights are firmly protected under Sharia and the law, and cannot be denied through ...

item.title: Mixed reactions to Angus Taylor’s Midwinter Ball speech and media industry rumours emerge
item.description: Canberra’s annual Midwinter Ball, often referred to as one of the capital’s key political social events, saw mixed reactions this year following speeches from senior political figures. According to at...

item.title: Alex Eala and Maya Joint set for Wimbledon clash with contrasting goals
item.description: The upcoming Wimbledon match between Alex Eala and Maya Joint is shaping up to be an intriguing encounter, with both players bringing different motivations into their showdown. Alex Eala enters the ma...

item.title: Africa’s 20 major infrastructure projects focus on domestic value creation
item.description: This article looks at a major overview of 20 large infrastructure megaprojects across Africa that show a shift in how the continent is approaching development. According to The Africa Report, these pr...

item.title: Emerging Australian designers spotlighted at Decor + Design 2026 in Melbourne
item.description: Decor + Design 2026, celebrating its 22nd year, is set to take place in Melbourne from 15 to 17 July, positioning itself as Australia’s leading design trade fair. The event will feature more than 200 ...

item.title: NDMA issues nationwide alert for GLOF, flash floods and landslides during active monsoon period
item.description: The National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) of Pakistan has issued a comprehensive weather and disaster alert warning of increased risks of glacial lake outburst floods (GLOFs), flash floods, la...

item.title: UK forecast shows temperatures rising to 29°C amid July heatwave with regional contrasts
item.description: The UK is set to experience another spell of hot weather as temperatures rise again in a developing July heatwave, with forecasters indicating highs of around 29°C in parts of the country. According t...

item.title: Udupi resident found dead in Goa hotel room; police initiate murder investigation
item.description: A 42-year-old man from Malpe in Karnataka’s Udupi district, identified as Sandeep Saliyan, was found dead under suspicious circumstances in a hotel room in Calangute, Goa. Following the incident, Goa ...

item.title: Explore Mediterranean culture, cuisine and coastal attractions in Valencia, Spain
item.description: This sponsored travel feature highlights the Valencia region in Spain as a diverse and accessible Mediterranean destination offering a mix of cuisine, culture, history and natural beauty. Known as the...

item.title: Government restarts Sinza redevelopment plan following resident inclusion concerns
item.description: The Government has announced a restart of the Sinza Redevelopment Plan in Dar es Salaam after residents raised serious concerns over lack of proper public participation and unclear land ownership righ...
